content:
# Best AI Podcasting Tools for Beginners in 2026

Starting a podcast is easier than ever thanks to AI tools that handle the technical stuff so you can focus on your content!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]: Edit Audio by Editing Text

[[link:/tools/79|Descript]] is a game-changer for beginners because it lets you edit audio just like editing a document.

### Descript for Beginners
- **Text-based editing**: Delete filler words by deleting the text
- **AI voice generation**: Create voiceovers or fix mistakes
- **Auto-transcription**: Get accurate transcripts instantly

---

## [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]: Professional AI Voiceovers

[[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] creates incredibly realistic AI voices that are perfect for intros, ads, or even full episodes.

### ElevenLabs for Podcasting
- **Human-like voices**: Listeners won't know it's AI
- **Emotion control**: Adjust the tone of the voice
- **Voice cloning**: Clone your own voice or create a unique one

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

---

## [[link:/tools/200|Suno]]: AI-Generated Music for Your Podcast

Use [[link:/tools/200|Suno]] to create original intro music, transitions, and background music without worrying about copyright.

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] | Editing | $12/mo |
| [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] | Voiceovers | $5/mo |
| [[link:/tools/200|Suno]] | Music | $8/mo |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Just starting**: Try free plans first
- **Editing focus**: Start with [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]
- **Music needs**: Add [[link:/tools/200|Suno]]

Ready to start your podcast? Give these AI tools a try!
